title: Prompt and Instructions Management
description: Developer provides static or dynamic instructions; SDK validates signatures and renders prompts

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Configures Agent with instructions and/or prompt at definition time

actors.name: RunLoop
actors.description: Internal SDK orchestrator that resolves instructions/prompts each turn before calling the model

actors.name: OpenAI Model
actors.description: Receives resolved system_prompt + prompt_config (ResponsePromptParam) from the SDK

use_cases.name: Define Static Instructions
use_cases.description: Set Agent.instructions = str. Used verbatim as system prompt every run.

use_cases.name: Define Dynamic Instructions
use_cases.description: Set Agent.instructions = Callable[[RunContextWrapper, Agent], MaybeAwaitable[str]]. Callable must accept exactly 2 params (context, agent). Both sync and async supported.

use_cases.name: Define Static Prompt Template
use_cases.description: Set Agent.prompt = Prompt (TypedDict with id, optional version, optional variables). References an OpenAI platform prompt by ID. Only works with OpenAI Responses API.
use_cases.key_field: Prompt: TypedDict { id: str, version?: str, variables?: dict[str, ResponsesPromptVariables] }

use_cases.name: Define Dynamic Prompt Template
use_cases.description: Set Agent.prompt = DynamicPromptFunction = Callable[[GenerateDynamicPromptData], MaybeAwaitable[Prompt]]. Receives GenerateDynamicPromptData(context, agent) and must return a Prompt dict.

use_cases.name: Validate Instructions Type
use_cases.description: Agent.__post_init__ enforces instructions is str, callable, or None. Raises TypeError otherwise. get_system_prompt enforces callable has exactly 2 params.

use_cases.name: Validate Prompt Type
use_cases.description: Agent.__post_init__ enforces prompt is None, callable, or has .get() (dict). PromptUtil.to_model_input raises UserError if dynamic function returns non-dict.

use_cases.name: Resolve System Prompt at Runtime
use_cases.description: RunLoop calls agent.get_system_prompt(context_wrapper) each turn. Returns str for static, awaits/calls callable for dynamic. Returns None if instructions is None.

use_cases.name: Render Prompt to Model Input
use_cases.description: RunLoop calls agent.get_prompt(context_wrapper) which delegates to PromptUtil.to_model_input(prompt, context, agent). Returns ResponsePromptParam | None. For dynamic prompts, invokes the DynamicPromptFunction with GenerateDynamicPromptData.
use_cases.key_method: Agent.get_prompt(RunContextWrapper) -> ResponsePromptParam | None; PromptUtil.to_model_input(prompt, context, agent)

use_cases.name: Apply Handoff Prompt Prefix
use_cases.description: Prepend RECOMMENDED_PROMPT_PREFIX or call prompt_with_handoff_instructions(prompt) to help LLM understand handoff transfers. Prefix explains agent coordination and transfer_to_<agent_name> pattern.

use_cases.name: Configure Handoff Tool Description
use_cases.description: Define handoff_description on Agent (appended to default tool description). Or use tool_description_override in handoff(). Default: 'Handoff to the {agent.name} agent...' + handoff_description.

use_cases.name: Filter Handoff Input History
use_cases.description: Provide input_filter: HandoffInputFilter on handoff(). Receives HandoffInputData(input_history, pre_handoff_items, new_items, run_context, input_items) and returns modified HandoffInputData. Per-handoff filter takes precedence over RunConfig.handoff_input_filter.

use_cases.name: Clone Agent with New Instructions
use_cases.description: Call agent.clone(instructions=...) to shallow-copy agent with overridden instructions or prompt. Uses dataclasses.replace.

use_cases.name: Pass Instructions to Model
use_cases.description: RunLoop gathers system_prompt + prompt_config in parallel, applies call_model_input_filter, then passes filtered.instructions + prompt_config to model.stream_response() or model.get_response().
use_cases.key_flow: asyncio.gather(get_system_prompt, get_prompt) -> apply_call_model_input_filter -> model.stream_response(instructions, input, model_settings, tools, prompt=prompt_config)

key_relationships: Agent.instructions: str | Callable | None — governs system prompt source
Agent.prompt: Prompt | DynamicPromptFunction | None — governs OpenAI prompt template
PromptUtil.to_model_input delegates to DynamicPromptFunction via GenerateDynamicPromptData(context, agent)
Agent.get_system_prompt calls instructions callable with (RunContextWrapper, Agent) — exactly 2 params enforced
Handoff.default_tool_description uses Agent.handoff_description for handoff prompt hint
prompt_with_handoff_instructions wraps developer instructions with RECOMMENDED_PROMPT_PREFIX
RunLoop resolves both system_prompt and prompt concurrently before model call

key_types.Prompt: TypedDict { id: str, version?: str, variables?: dict[str, ResponsesPromptVariables] }
key_types.HandoffInputData: frozen dataclass { input_history, pre_handoff_items, new_items, run_context, input_items }

validation_rules: instructions must be str, callable, or None (TypeError in __post_init__)
callable instructions must accept exactly 2 args: (context, agent) — enforced in get_system_prompt
prompt must be None, callable, or dict-like (has .get()) — enforced in __post_init__
DynamicPromptFunction must return a dict (Prompt) — UserError in PromptUtil.to_model_input
on_handoff with input_type: callable must accept 2 args (context, input_data)
on_handoff without input_type: callable must accept 1 arg (context)
important_notes: instructions and prompt are mutually usable; instructions produces system_prompt string while prompt produces ResponsePromptParam for OpenAI Responses API only. RunLoop calls both in parallel and passes both to the model. RECOMMENDED_PROMPT_PREFIX is a string constant, not SDK-enforced — developers opt in manually.
